zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de  Basing於1295年出生在英國德比夏爾蕾托 伊頓時，她的父親Sir Robert De Basing Alderman of London35歲，母親Margery de Basing30歲。她於1317年與Thomas de Louvain Lord of Little Easton在英國德比夏爾德比德比 聖 阿爾可蒙德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1320年在英國艾可享年25歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可武特萊斯福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de  Basing于1295年出生在英国德比夏爾蕾托 伊頓时，她的父亲Sir Robert De Basing Alderman of London35岁，母亲Margery de Basing30岁。她于1317年与Thomas de Louvain Lord of Little Easton在英国德比夏爾德比德比 聖 阿爾可蒙德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1320年在英国艾可享年25岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可武特萊斯福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Basing
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Basing in Hants.

2 English: relationship name occasionally perhaps from the Middle English personal name Basing or Besing, perhaps an Old English pet form of Old Scandinavian Bassi or Bessi (a recognized pet-form, via bersi, of bjǫrn ‘bear’), or perhaps Old English Bassa. Apart from the 1202 example, the following bearers may alternatively belong with (1).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de  Basing was born in 1295, in Little Eaton, Derbyshire, England, her father, Sir Robert De Basing Alderman of London, was 35 and her mother, Margery de Basing, was 30. She married Thomas de Louvain Lord of Little Easton in 1317, in Derby St Alkmund, Derby, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1320, in Essex, England, at the age of 25, and was buried in Uttlesford, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de  Basing est née en 1295, à Little Eaton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert De Basing Alderman of London, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margery de Basing, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Louvain Lord of Little Easton en 1317, à Derby St Alkmund, Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1320, à Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 25 ans, et a été enterrée à Uttlesford, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de  Basing 1295 in Little Eaton, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert De Basing Alderman of London 35 und ihre Mutter Margery de Basing 30. Sie hat 1317 in Derby St Alkmund, Derby, Derbyshire, England Thomas de Louvain Lord of Little Easton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1320 im Alter von 25 Jahren in Essex, England und wurde in Uttlesford, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Thomas de Louvain Lord of Little Easton nel 1317, nel Derby St Alkmund, Derby, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Joan de  Basingが1295年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアリットル エアトンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert De Basing Alderman of Londonは35歳，母Margery de Basingは30歳であった。1317年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーデルビー スト アルクムンドでThomas de Louvain Lord of Little Eastonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1320年にイギリスエセックスで25歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスウットレスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.Derby St Alkmund, Derby, Derbyshire, Eng: 영국 더비실르 더비 더비 스트 알크먼드
ko.lifeSummary: Joan de  Basing(이)가 1295년 영국 더비실르 리틀 이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert De Basing Alderman of London(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery de Basing(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1317년 영국 더비실르 더비 더비 스트 알크먼드에서 Thomas de Louvain Lord of Little Easton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1320년 영국 에세스에서 25세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 우틀레스퍼드에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Thomas de Louvain Lord of Little Easton em 1317, em Derby St Alkmund, Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.Derby St Alkmund, Derby, Derbyshire, Eng: дирби ст алкмунд, дирби, дирбишир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de  Basing родилась в 1295 г. в местности литл эатон, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert De Basing Alderman of London было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery de Basing, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Louvain Lord of Little Easton в 1317 г. в местности дирби ст алкмунд, дирби, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1320 г. в местности эссекс, Англия в возрасте 25 лет и была похоронена в местности уттлесфорд, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Thomas de Louvain Lord of Little Easton en 1317, en Derby St Alkmund, Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1320, en Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 25 años, y fue sepultada en Uttlesford, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
